description: Stream Live IPTV, Video On-Demand, and Series from an Xtream-compatible server using this plugin.
name: Jellyfin Xtream
overview: Stream content from an Xtream-compatible server.

versions.changelog: Custom build: increase live restream buffer, improve live buffer synchronization, preserve configured User-Agent for stream requests, update Jellyfin 10.11 dependencies, and add configurable regex cleanup rules for stream names.
